PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LOPEZ, ADOLFO PINEDA, JULIA ZELAYA, MARTHA TABORA, MARTHA TABORA, MARGARITA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT STEPHENS, CASSANDRA $19,842.16 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $19,842.16, PLAINTIFFS TO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT AS FOLLOWS, PLUS COSTS: ADOLFO LOPEZ: $6542.16. JULIA PINEDA: $3800.00. MARTHA ZELAYA: $3500.00. MARTHA TABORA: $3000.00.0 MARGARITA TABORA[A MINOR BY AND THROUGH MARTHA ZELAYA, HER GUARDIAN AD LITEM]:$3000.00.
